# hooks-auth-confirm-delete-account

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for confirmDeleteAccount

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useConfirmDeleteAccountMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useConfirmDeleteAccountMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useConfirmDeleteAccountMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
